nodes.name: Fetch HN Stories
nodes.notes: Fetch top 30 story details for title extraction

parameters.query: SELECT keyword FROM trending_log WHERE keyword = '{{ $json.keyword }}' AND detected_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' UNION SELECT topic FROM topic_ideas WHERE topic ILIKE '%{{ $json.keyword }}%' AND status != 'rejected'

INSERT INTO trending_log (keyword, sources, source_count, sample_titles) VALUES ('{{ $('Cross-Reference Sources').item.json.keyword }}', ARRAY[{{ $('Cross-Reference Sources').item.json.sources.map(s => "'" + s + "'").join(',') }}], {{ $('Cross-Reference Sources').item.json.source_count }}, ARRAY[{{ $('Cross-Reference Sources').item.json.sample_titles.map(s => "'" + s.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'").join(',') }}])

INSERT INTO topic_ideas (topic, priority, notes, status) VALUES ('{{ $('Cross-Reference Sources').item.json.keyword }}', 1, 'trending - detected in {{ $('Cross-Reference Sources').item.json.sources.join(", ") }}', 'pending')
